name: frame_schema
details: Structural metadata describing frames, columns, keys, relations, roles, and future logical type information.

name: transformation_intent
details: Configuration or intent required by transformations to interpret frames correctly.

name: projection_scope
details: Evidence of what was projected and therefore what a later inverse projection may interpret as editable scope.

name: runtime_resolution
details: Materialized current-run resolution that may be needed for recomposition but should not silently accumulate.

name: presentation_intent
details: User or workflow intent for visible workbook presentation, such as widths, labels, formatting, or display preferences.

name: layout
details: Render-layer layout artifact derived from metadata/config and consumed by spreadsheet writers.
